title: deanea pringlei
intro: Deanea pringlei, also known as Pringle's yerba santa, is a perennial shrub native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally, Deanea pringlei has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antiseptic, due to the presence of volatile oils and tannins. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing respiratory issues, relieving digestive problems, and reducing fever. Deanea pringlei can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat colds, bronchitis, and other respiratory ailments.
